descriptors: I am a poor man who has always been looking for a way to make a living. I learned the basics of alchemy from master Antonio.
agenda: Pretend to be Carlo's father and find him
Obtain the secret of eternal life, thanks to alchemy

gifts.name: Improvised Alchemist
gifts.description: Geppetto can rely on a series of alchemical compounds contained in vials that he hides under a tacky yellow wig. When he throws a vial, roll a die: 1-2 Explosive: The liquid explodes on contact with the air, causing 1 Wound to everyone within thirty feet. Thick black smoke will engulf the whole area; 3-4 Stench: A nauseating odor fills the air giving 1 Penalty to all actions within the area for the rest of the Scene; 5-6 Air Bomb: All subjects in an area of thirty feet are knocked back and fall to the ground. If they hit an obstacle they can suffer 1 Wound. Geppetto is immune to the effects of his alchemical concoctions.

system.background: One of two alchemists who kidnapped people in Sinalunga to experiment on them. Geppetto believes Carlo is the key to eternal life and is desperately searching for the living puppet. Wears a tacky yellow wig that hides his alchemical vials.
system.notes: Appears at the Gambero Rosso Inn playing the role of a worried father looking for his 'son' Carlo. Will describe Carlo's old elegant shoes as a clue.
